en: Backend and Cloud Developer with experience building serverless APIs, event-driven integrations, IoT telemetry pipelines, and cloud-native systems using AWS Lambda, AppSync, DynamoDB, Node.js, TypeScript, Python, MongoDB, and Docker.

Strong background in production systems involving high-volume data, real-time communication, cost-aware architecture, observability, and maintainability. Experienced in transforming business requirements into scalable backend solutions, refactoring legacy flows, and supporting architectural decisions.
Also experienced with applied AI workflows, including RAG, MCP, LLM automation, and agents for productivity, data analysis, and engineering support.
pt: Desenvolvedor Backend e Cloud com experiencia na construcao de APIs serverless, integracoes orientadas a eventos, pipelines de telemetria IoT e sistemas cloud-native usando AWS Lambda, AppSync, DynamoDB, Node.js, TypeScript, Python, MongoDB e Docker.

Base forte em sistemas de producao envolvendo alto volume de dados, comunicacao em tempo real, arquitetura orientada a custo, observabilidade e manutencao. Experiencia transformando requisitos de negocio em solucoes backend escalaveis, refatorando fluxos legados e apoiando decisoes arquiteturais.
Tambem atua com fluxos de IA aplicada, incluindo RAG, MCP, automacoes com LLMs e agentes para produtividade, analise de dados e suporte a engenharia.
